title: Copper Equipment by NixNiko2018
description: This mod adds copper tools and armor. The tools and armor are slightly better than stone tools and armor, but worse than iron.
body:
This mod adds copper tools and armor. The tools and armor are slightly better than stone tools and armor, but worse than iron.

![Cooper tools and armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07158db1105e3c078eab77220c1f8cfa1567b4f4.png)

Copper pickaxe can mine diamonds.

Avaible on:
- Forge: 1.20.1
- NeoForge: 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8
